scenarios.name: baseline — swap + perp-short widgets both render

scenarios.name: spot long BTC — SWAP USDC → BTC (90% capital)

scenarios.name: short BTC dated futures on Deribit (fixed-maturity hedge)

expected.notes: Perp-short leg simulates a dated-futures hedge; completes the CARRY_BASIS_DATED SSOT flow.

scenarios.name: basis spread + roll cost analytics visible

expected.notes: Idempotent ledger check — multiple executes produce distinct rows.
Reactive-only — tightening slippage reduces aggregate price impact for dated-futures carry.
